The '''Imperial Cargo Trader''' was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to transport trade goods between [[City/Legends|cities]] and ground bases. It also was used to trade valuable [[Mineral/Legends|minerals]] for [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]], a rare [[Gemstone/Legends|gem]].

{{Veh-stub}}
